notes: Game uses Ricochet Anti Cheat which runs as a Windows kernel mode service, since Wine isn't running a full Wndows kernel stack its likely all games using this AC will always be broken under any version of Wine.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (SIENNA_CICHLID, DRM 3.40.0, 5.11.0-38-generic, LLVM 12.0.0)
